languages.text: Помог{mf||ла} Нунциусу узреть свет Бога-Императора на смертном одре.
Helped Nuncius see the light of the God-Emperor before his death.
languages.original_text: Помог{mf||ла} Нунциусу узреть свет Бога-Императора на смертном одре.

traits.locale_text: Helped Nuncius see the light of the God-Emperor before his death.
Helped Nuncius see the light of the God-Emperor before his death.
Helped Nuncius see the light of the God-Emperor before his death.

languages.text: Ayudaste a Nuncius a ver la luz del Dios Emperador antes de morir.
languages.original_text: Helped Nuncius see the light of the God-Emperor before his death.

traits.locale_text: Ayudaste a Nuncius a ver la luz del Dios Emperador antes de morir.

languages.text: 帮助努恩修斯在死前见到了神皇的圣光。
languages.original_text: Helped Nuncius see the light of the God-Emperor before his death.

traits.locale_text: 帮助努恩修斯在死前见到了神皇的圣光。

languages.text: Vous avez aidé Nuncius à voir la lumière de l'Empereur-Dieu avant sa mort.
languages.original_text: Helped Nuncius see the light of the God-Emperor before his death.

traits.locale_text: Vous avez aidé Nuncius à voir la lumière de l'Empereur-Dieu avant sa mort.

languages.text: Nuncius ölmeden önce Tanrı İmparator'un ışığını görmesine yardım ettin.
languages.original_text: Helped Nuncius see the light of the God-Emperor before his death.

traits.locale_text: Nuncius ölmeden önce Tanrı İmparator'un ışığını görmesine yardım ettin.

languages.text: Nuncius geholfen, vor seinem Tod das Licht des Gottimperators zu sehen.
languages.original_text: Helped Nuncius see the light of the God-Emperor before his death.

traits.locale_text: Nuncius geholfen, vor seinem Tod das Licht des Gottimperators zu sehen.

languages.text: 死を前にしたヌンキウスが神帝陛下の光を見出すのを助けた。
languages.original_text: Helped Nuncius see the light of the God-Emperor before his death.

traits.locale_text: 死を前にしたヌンキウスが神帝陛下の光を見出すのを助けた。
